content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.lip_sync
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/lip_sync.py (483 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Lip Sync Engine - Real-time viseme generation from audio/text
Supports: Rhubarb, phoneme-based, amplitude-based, neural (MuseTalk)

CLASSES:
- Viseme(Enum): Preston Blair phoneme set - standard for animation
- VisemeEvent: A single viseme with timing
  Methods: def duration(self) -> float
- LipSyncData: Complete lip sync data for an audio clip
  Methods: def get_viseme_at(self, time: float) -> Tuple[str, float]
- LipSyncMethod(Enum): Available lip sync methods
- LipSyncEngine: Multi-method lip sync engine for Cosmos VTuber

Generates viseme sequences from:
  Methods: async def generate_from_audio(self, audio_path: str, transcript: Optional[str]=None) -> LipSyncData
  Methods: async def generate_from_text(self, text: str, words_per_minute: float=150) -> LipSyncData
  Methods: async def generate_from_timestamps(self, text: str, word_timestamps: List[Dict]) -> LipSyncData
  Methods: async def stream_visemes(self, lip_sync_data: LipSyncData, start_time: float=0.0) -> AsyncGenerator[
  Methods: def process_audio_chunk(self, audio_chunk: np.ndarray, sample_rate: int=16000) -> Tuple[str, float]
  Methods: def current_viseme(self) -> str
  Methods: def current_intensity(self) -> float
